meta.title: ContinuumIQ - AI Customer Exit Risk Intelligence Platform
meta.description: Predict customer churn 90 days in advance with 95% accuracy. Protect revenue, defend market share, and strengthen relationships with explainable AI.

hero.title: Predict Customer Exit Risk Before It's Too Late
hero.subtitle: ContinuumIQ gives enterprises 90 days of advance warning with 95% prediction accuracy - turning silent attrition into protected revenue.

crisis.title: The Customer Attrition Crisis
crisis.subtitle: Customer attrition remains a critical blind spot for corporate leadership - representing substantial unmanaged financial exposure.
crisis.insight_text: Most corporations identify at-risk customers only after visible signals emerge - by then, intervention is often too late.
crisis.imperative_text: Organizations must move from reactive retention to predictive risk intelligence.

industries.title: Churn Rates Across Sectors
industries.subtitle: Comparative analysis of customer attrition rates and retention challenges by industry.
industries.telecom_note: Highest churn sector - 1 in 5 new customers forecasts negative lifetime value.
industries.finance_note: Wide variance by segment with significant retention opportunity.
industries.saas_note: Benchmark for subscription models - churn directly impacts valuation.
industries.retail_note: Highly competitive landscape with low switching costs.

gap.title: The Enterprise Capability Gap
gap.subtitle: Despite sustained investment, organizations identify customer exit risk too late for effective intervention.
gap.existing_1: CRM Platforms - managing millions of records
gap.existing_2: Analytics Teams - data science and BI capabilities
gap.existing_3: Digital Infrastructure - online platforms and touchpoints
gap.missing_1: Fragmented Data - silos prevent holistic view
gap.missing_3: Weak Financial Linkage - no revenue impact connection
gap.conclusion: Explainable AI that connects behavioral signals to financial impact - current systems identify what but cannot explain why.

platform.title: Enterprise-Grade Intelligence
platform.subtitle: Purpose-built to help organizations proactively identify, understand, and manage customer exit risk.
platform.capability1_text: No black-box predictions. Traceable insights executives can act on with confidence.
platform.capability2_text: Links behavioral signals directly to revenue impact with revenue-linked metrics.
platform.capability3_text: Detects silent attrition signals 6-12 months in advance.
platform.capability4_text: Board-ready insights that bridge technical outputs and executive decision-making.
platform.capability5_text: Works alongside your current technology stack with zero disruption.
platform.capability6_text: Explainable models that satisfy governance and regulatory scrutiny.

value.title: Quantifiable Financial Value
value.subtitle: Evidence-based examples demonstrating the material financial value of customer exit risk mitigation.
value.valuation: Reducing churn by 1% can increase company valuation by 12%+ for subscription businesses.
value.compound: A 5% increase in retention can boost profits by 25-95%.
value.compound_detail: Through reduced acquisition costs, higher lifetime value, and increased referrals.

caseStudies.title: Proven Performance
caseStudies.subtitle: Demonstrating predictive accuracy across different geographic markets.
caseStudies.conclusion: Both case studies demonstrate 95%+ precision and 92%+ AUC, validating reliability across diverse markets.

pricing.title: Start Protecting Revenue Today
pricing.subtitle: Transparent pricing with plans that scale with your business.
pricing.starter_desc: For growing companies ready to predict churn.
pricing.enterprise_desc: For large organizations with complex needs.

security.title: Enterprise-Grade Security & Compliance
security.subtitle: Built for organizations that demand the highest standards of data protection and regulatory compliance.
security.feature1_text: Full compliance framework for global data protection regulations.
security.feature3_text: TLS 1.3 encryption for all data in transit and at rest.
security.feature4_text: Role-based access control with full audit logging.
security.feature5_text: Built-in data anonymization to protect customer identities.
security.feature6_text: Explainable models that satisfy governance and regulatory scrutiny.
security.uptime_text: Enterprise reliability with guaranteed service levels.
security.architecture_text: Scalable, modular design with API-first integration.

about.title: Transform Risk Into Competitive Advantage
about.subtitle: We build the intelligence layer that helps enterprises predict, prevent, and profit from customer retention.
about.mission_text: To eliminate the $1.6 trillion in annual global revenue lost to preventable customer attrition through explainable, actionable AI.
about.vision_text: A world where no business loses a customer they could have saved - where predictive intelligence is a standard enterprise capability.
about.moat2_text: Position as an AI-driven platform, not a logistics company.
about.moat3_text: Proprietary behavioral models that strengthen with every data point.
about.moat4_text: Transform customer data into intelligence-driven growth.
